title: verbascum × astrophyllum
intro: Verbascum × astrophyllum, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family, known for its large, woolly leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Verbascum × astrophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for a range of health concerns.
